name: Faro de Favàritx
description: A lighthouse on a cape of striated black slate that looks like another planet, at the northern edge of the s'Albufera des Grau Natural Park.

planner.shuttleInfo: Car access restricted in summer (approx. 1 Jun–mid Oct): seasonal bus from Maó (line ~43, ~€3.50/trip). Confirm the year's calendar.
